title: Spagurder's TechPlus
description: A tech and vanilla plus-focused NeoForge modpack adding automation, machines, and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
Spagurder's TechPlus is a Vanilla Plus and Tech modpack initially put together to play with my friends. It includes the
Create mod with a handful of addons, as well several Vanilla Plus mods addressing performance, quality of life, 
world and structure generation, and audiovisual ambience. The goal was to keep the modpack fairly lightweight,
so other than Create and its addons, care was taken not to excessively include high performance impacting mods.

Besides Create, some of the highlights include Tectonic and Terralith, a variety of structure mods including Dungeons 
and Taverns and most of YUNG's structure mods, and a some other visual mods such as Handcrafted, Chipped,
and Stoneworks. Altogether, there are about 127 mods, with the majority being quality of life and custom structure mods.


See [credits.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/murderspagurder/spagurders-techplus/refs/heads/main/credits.txt) for a full list of all creators whose work has been used in this project 
(including past versions)

<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>
This project follows an adaptation of Semantic Versioning. Version 1.0.0 is the initial release for Minecraft 1.20.1.
When the Create mod updates to 1.21.x, this modpack will be updated to 2.0.0.

The major version is upgraded when: Updating to a new minecraft version

The minor version is upgraded when: Making compatibility-breaking changes, such as adding or removing mods, or changing the NeoForge version

The patch version is upgraded when: Making non-compatibility-breaking changes, such as adding or removing client-side-only mods, or changing configurations

*Note: Compatibility here refers to the ability for a client to play on a server and with other clients. 
Major and Minor version must match, but patch number can be different
</details>
